title: The Past Begins to Explain the War
description: On pages 12–15, this part follows King Neptune, Unknown person #1, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Royal Guards, Marines, Hody Jones. The core story beat is the past begins to explain the war.
scene: The scene centers on the past begins to explain the war, with King Neptune, Unknown person #1, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Royal Guards, Marines, Hody Jones driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: ...but it looks like someone beat us to it! Neptunee and his troops are all tied up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm quite amazed... whoever is responsible for this, they left us quite a present...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could it be a trap?! This is far too good to be true.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The guests just keep coming, don't they...? This is one lively palace, all right...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PLEASE!! You must at least return us our weapons!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see now... you must be in cahoots with these scoundrels! It was you who granted them passage into the palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look, we wouldn't even be here in the first place if you hadn't invited us!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Now who the heck are those crazy powerful- looking guys?!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Vander Becken!! Now that you have shown your face here, there can be no further doubt!!! You are the culprit!!! Return my daughter at once!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bahohohohohohohohohohoh! I ain't even married the girl yet! Don't you think you're getting a little ahead of yourself, pops?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I am not your "Pops"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: What have you done with Shirahoshii?! you had better not have harmed a hair on her head!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: What's this guy blabbering about...? You tryin' to tell me Shirahoshii's already gone off somewhere...?

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Do not play the fool, decken!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What other explanation is there for her sudden disappearance?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: My beloved Shirahoshii... disappeared?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She is no property of yours!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty!! There is no need to rise to this disgu- sting man's provocations in

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Calm yourself, decken!! Take a look around. The humans you sent flying towards the Princess have arrived here in the palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At the very least, that means she was still here when you launched the attack!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: besides which, regardless of the truth of these men's words...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: You have an infallible means of finding the Princess' whereabouts, do you not?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: True enough!! You're a sharp one, hordy my man!! I know it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fly, Coral!! Fly to my beloved Shira- Hosh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not heading for the shell tower...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kuah! We've been joined by the bonds of love for ten years now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nothing short of death could hope to keep us apart!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Bahoho hoh... I'll never surrender you to another man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: I'd sooner see you die a bloody death!!!! Shirahoshioshosh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Q: You are not wrong. I just fused the two. Since the pink hat is Chopper's treasure, so it didn't need

summary: The Past Begins to Explain the War. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
